name: Maruti Suzuki WagonR
description: The Maruti Suzuki Wagon R is a popular, spacious tall-boy hatchback known for urban practicality, excellent cabin space, and high fuel efficiency

name: Maruti Suzuki Ertiga
description: The Maruti Suzuki Ertiga is a popular 7-seater MPV known for practicality, efficiency, and comfort with Smart Hybrid technology

name: Renault Duster
description: The 2026 Renault Duster is a rugged midsize SUV built for adventure, high ground clearance, and long road trips
